assessment.note: They explicitly asked for more mentoring and said it was raised months ago with nothing happening, showing strong growth frustration and a slight disengagement signal from not pushing.

new_queue.label: Rewrite role
new_queue.name: What role would make sense for you in the billing rewrite?
new_queue.description: Clarifies how they might best fit into the upcoming rewrite without assuming enthusiasm or resistance.

new_queue.label: Rewrite risk
new_queue.name: Where do you expect the billing rewrite to get difficult?
new_queue.description: Surfaces anticipated technical or coordination risks before the work starts.

new_queue.label: Mentoring path
new_queue.name: What would mentoring actually look like in your week, and what would you need to drop to make space for it?
new_queue.description: Turns the mentoring interest into a concrete time-and-tradeoff discussion.

new_queue.label: Stretch edge
new_queue.name: What part of your work right now feels most like a stretch?
new_queue.description: Finds where they are learning, overextended, or under-challenged in a concrete way.
